title: Procedure Before Code
prompt: Identify the stepwise method, representation, input, transformation, and output before asking whether it resembles modern programming.

title: Etymology Is Not Total Origin
prompt: Use the al-Khwārizmī connection carefully: it is central to the word algorithm, but algorithms have multiple lineages.

title: Translation Is Creation
prompt: Track how translation, commentary, teaching, and adaptation transform procedural knowledge across contexts.
